---
title: 'Building the Computing System for Autonomous Micromobility Vehicles: Design
  Constraints and Architectural Optimizations'
author:
- Bo Yu
- Wei Hu
- Leimeng Xu
- Jie Tang
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/micro20-amv.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/building-the-computing-system-for-autonomous-micromobility-vehicles-design-constraints-and-architectural-optimizations
journ: MICRO
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 44
---
